description: 10 cached fitted-readout trajectories, including one recorded residual intervention; no generated WAV is shipped pending rights review.
label: Chatterbox TTS

rank_semantics.acoustic_code_warning: Ordinary acoustic-code IDs are learned contextual symbols, not words or published phonemes.

rights_policy.audio: Generated baseline and counterfactual WAV files are excluded from this preview pending conversion, S3-tokenizer, and derived-output redistribution review.
rights_policy.prompts: Project-authored text prompts may be displayed.

reports.prompt: A bright red train crossed the narrow bridge.
reports.summary: Keep three questions separate: when realized code ID 4106 becomes readable, which prompt tokens local diagnostics emphasize, and what a replayed residual edit causes.
reports.title: A bridge at S9: emergence, sensitivity, and causal steering

reports.prompt: Tiny turtles travel together toward the tide.
reports.summary: Give visitors a clean fitted-rank trajectory while disclosing that it is unusually tidy relative to the screened population.
reports.title: Tiny turtles: a nearly monotonic trajectory

reports.prompt: Music fades as the evening grows quiet.
reports.summary: Counter the impression that fitted readouts must improve layer by layer: the realized code worsens at L4 and again at L12 before resolving late.
reports.title: Music fades: readability can reverse

reports.prompt: Which voice sounds clearer in this sentence?
reports.summary: Add a held-out interrogative with final question punctuation.
reports.title: Which voice? Question contour

reports.prompt: Record the new record before lunch.
reports.summary: Compare identical spelling in two grammatical and pronunciation contexts.
reports.title: Record / record in context

reports.prompt: Enter code nine zero four, then press pound.
reports.summary: Add ordered number words and code-like grouping.
reports.title: Nine-zero-four as a code

reports.summary: Add repeated consonant structure across distinct words.
reports.title: Ruby ribbon: repeated sounds

reports.prompt: The door is open. Please close it.
reports.summary: Add a short sentence boundary followed by an imperative.
reports.title: Door left open: two clauses

reports.prompt: Please welcome Linh Nguyen after lunch.
reports.summary: Add less-common proper-name tokens in a familiar context.
reports.title: Welcoming Linh Nguyen

reports.prompt: First, plug in the hub. Then wait ten seconds.
reports.summary: Add explicit procedural ordering and a clause boundary.
reports.title: First, then: two steps
